Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for an Order granting motion for order to distribute settlement funds Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. for the plaintiff Jackie Holt, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to G.W. Holt, Deceased, et. al.
Co-Plaintiff Vicky Holt-Taylor, present in pro per.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the moving papers with evidence presented, and filed declarations by the parties, good cause appearing, the Court granted the motion to distribute settlement funds,reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.
Order was submitted and signed in open court, see details in scanned doc.
